tools.name: me.getMe
tools.description: Provides information about the signed in user.

tools.name: project.deleteProjectUsernameProjectBuildCache
tools.description: Clears the cache for a project.

tools.name: project.deleteProjectUsernameProjectCheckoutKeyFingerprint
tools.description: Delete a checkout key.

tools.name: project.deleteProjectUsernameProjectEnvvarName
tools.description: Deletes the environment variable named ':name'

tools.name: project.getProjectUsernameProject
tools.description: Build summary for each of the last 30 builds for a single git repo.

tools.name: project.getProjectUsernameProjectBuildNum
tools.description:
Full details for a single build. The response includes all of the fields from the build summary.
This is also the payload for the [notification webhooks](/docs/configuration/#notify), in which case this object is the value to a key named 'payload'.

tools.name: project.getProjectUsernameProjectBuildNumArtifacts
tools.description: List the artifacts produced by a given build.

tools.name: project.getProjectUsernameProjectBuildNumTests
tools.description:
Provides test metadata for a build
Note: [Learn how to set up your builds to collect test metadata](https://circleci.com/docs/test-metadata/)

tools.name: project.getProjectUsernameProjectCheckoutKey
tools.description: Lists checkout keys.

tools.name: project.getProjectUsernameProjectCheckoutKeyFingerprint
tools.description: Get a checkout key.

tools.name: project.getProjectUsernameProjectEnvvar
tools.description: Lists the environment variables for :project

tools.name: project.getProjectUsernameProjectEnvvarName
tools.description: Gets the hidden value of environment variable :name

tools.name: project.postProjectUsernameProject
tools.description: Triggers a new build, returns a summary of the build.

tools.name: project.postProjectUsernameProjectBuildNumCancel
tools.description: Cancels the build, returns a summary of the build.

tools.name: project.postProjectUsernameProjectBuildNumRetry
tools.description: Retries the build, returns a summary of the new build.

tools.name: project.postProjectUsernameProjectCheckoutKey
tools.description:
Creates a new checkout key.
Only usable with a user API token.

tools.name: project.postProjectUsernameProjectEnvvar
tools.description: Creates a new environment variable

tools.name: project.postProjectUsernameProjectSshKey
tools.description: Create an ssh key used to access external systems that require SSH key-based authentication

tools.name: project.postProjectUsernameProjectTreeBranch
tools.description:
Triggers a new build, returns a summary of the build.
Optional build parameters can be set using an experimental API.

Note: For more about build parameters, read about [using parameterized builds](https://circleci.com/docs/parameterized-builds/)

tools.name: projects.getProjects
tools.description: List of all the projects you're following on CircleCI, with build information organized by branch.

tools.name: recentBuilds.getRecentBuilds
tools.description: Build summary for each of the last 30 recent builds, ordered by build_num.

tools.name: user.postUserHerokuKey
tools.description: Adds your Heroku API key to CircleCI, takes apikey as form param name.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
